title: Implement under Diagnostics here in the Dashboard there are some erro...
description:
Objective:
- Under Diagnostics here in the Dashboard there are some errors shown, but I do not have information on suggestions on how to fix the errors, or even better: there seems to be no automated fix when an error shows up in the heslth check system. Can we implement to fix those errors and to show the user what has been done or what needs to be done to fix the errors

Execution scope:
- Convert the request into a concrete implementation change in the selected repository.
- Keep the scope bounded and directly tied to the requested UI, API, or code behavior.
- Preserve existing behavior outside the requested change.

Context and constraints:
- Can we implement to fix those errors and to show the user what has been done or what needs to be done to fix the errors

Definition of done:
- The requested change is implemented.
- Relevant validation or tests are run and recorded.
- Follow-up risks or open questions are noted in the task.

intake.refinement_summary: Structured from the rough brief with the local fallback refiner for engineering work.

handoff_notes:
Implemented remediation guidance for Diagnostics control-plane findings.

What changed:
- Added server-side remediation mapping in the diagnostics API
- Added per-finding operator guidance, suggested commands, and automation-level labels in the Diagnostics UI
- Kept the first step operator-safe: guidance and dry-run recommendations before any destructive automation

Validation:
- npm run build in engineering/rook-dashboard
- systemctl --user restart rook-dashboard.service
- curl http://127.0.0.1:3001/api/control/diagnostics confirmed remediation payloads

Follow-up:
- extend remediation coverage to integrity and backup findings
- decide which dry-run fixes are safe enough for explicit dashboard-triggered actions
